summary: Lewis Hamilton's arrival at Ferrari injects fresh momentum into the Scuderia's championship bid as the seven-time world champion seeks to build on his dominant Spanish victory. McLaren's relentless pace threatens to capitalize on any Ferrari inconsistency, setting up a three-way dogfight where tire management and qualifying performance separate contenders from pretenders. A strong showing from Hamilton would signal Ferrari's resurging competitiveness and reshape the title narrative heading into the sport's second half.
